utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present with physical and mental components, includes plans, benefits, and costs; also a total cost. Fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Present with plan, benefits, and cost. Fully specified with cost.
- travel_coverage: Present with plan, benefits, and cost. Fully specified with cost.
- additional_services: Present with at least one add-on including benefits and cost; also another optional note (without cost) but at least one add-on has costs. Interpreting as satisfied since it asks for any enhancement services with costs.
- total_budget: Present with monthly figure, but missing annual cost breakdown (the format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). Therefore not fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four specific items that correspond to options in the ground-truth ratings: (1) Physical health plan: 'PrimeCare Premium Plan (Executive Premium)' which aligns with 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and has rating 10. (2) Mental health plan: 'EliteCare Premium Mental Health Plan' aligns with 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health and has rating 10. (3) Property coverage: 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches the same-named option under property_protection.home_content with rating 7. (4) Travel coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' matches the same-named option under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. The additional services listed do not match a specific named item in the ground-truth ratings, so they are not mapped.
